channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Fire risk and strong winds continue in Southern California with potential rain on the horizon
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Parched Southern California was forecast to face more dangerous winds on Wednesday but could get some badly needed rain this weekend, dampening the prospects of another round of killer wildfires though even a small amount of precipitation could could create new challenges like tox
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER WEBER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: China and US partners are moving closer as Trump returns to the White House
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — China's relations are starting to improve with Japan, India and other countries that former U.S. President Joe Biden courted, just as Donald Trump brings his more unilateralist approach back to the White House.
item.dc:creator: KEN MORITSUGU and DIDI TANG, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Suspected settlers attacked Palestinian villages hours before Trump rescinded Biden sanctions
item.description: JINSAFUT, West Bank (AP) — Shortly after suspected Jewish settlers stormed Palestinian villages in the occupied West Bank late Monday, setting cars and property ablaze, U.S. President Donald Trump canceled sanctions against Israelis accused of violence in the territory.
item.dc:creator: AREF TUFAHA and TIA GOLDENBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump targets Alaska's oil and other resources as environmentalists gear up for a fight
item.description: JUNEAU, Alaska (AP) — President Donald Trump's expansive executive order aimed at boosting oil and gas drilling, mining and logging in Alaska is being cheered by state political leaders who see new fossil fuel development as critical to Alaska's economic future and criticized by environmental groups
item.dc:creator: BECKY BOHRER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Winter storm that dropped record-breaking snow in New Orleans spreads into Florida and the Carolinas
item.description: A major winter storm that slammed Texas and the northern Gulf Coast is spreading heavy snow, sleet and freezing rain across parts of the Florida panhandle and eastern Carolinas.
item.dc:creator: Gerald Herbert And David J. Phillip, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: A$AP Rocky's lawyers look to find favorable jury as trial begins on charges he fired on ex-friend
item.description: Nearly 100 jurors will pack into a Los Angeles courtroom on Wednesday with the possibility they’ll serve on the three-week trial of rapper A$AP Rocky, who is charged with firing a gun at a former friend.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dalton, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: As fire-fanning winds continue, Southern California readies for potential rain and toxic runoff
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Parched Southern California continued to face dangerous winds but could get some badly needed rain this weekend, forecasters said Tuesday, dampening the prospects of another round of killer wildfires though even a small amount of precipitation could could create new challenges lik
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER WEBER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Panama, familiar with US intervention, bristles at Trump's comments on canal
item.description: PANAMA CITY (AP) — President Donald Trump’s insistence Monday that he wants the Panama Canal back under U.S. control fed nationalist sentiment and worry in Panama, home to the critical trade route and a country familiar with U.S. military intervention.
item.dc:creator: JUAN ZAMORANO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: US border patrol agent was fatally shot in Vermont near Canada
item.description: Authorities on Tuesday were investigating a fatal shooting of a U.S. Border Patrol agent that also left a suspect dead and another injured on a Vermont highway near Canada, authorities said. Agent David Maland was killed Monday afternoon following a traffic stop, a U.S.
item.dc:creator: KATHY McCORMACK and PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: German national suspect identified in deadly shooting of US Border Patrol agent in Vermont
item.description: A German national suspect on a legal visa allegedly killed a United States Border Agent during a traffic stop in Vermont near the Northern border on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Illinois among 22 states suing to stop Trump's order blocking birthright citizenship
item.description: CHICAGO — Illinois Attorney General Kwame Raoul on Tuesday joined three other states in a lawsuit challenging President Donald Trump's executive order that seeks to end birthright citizenship.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The ash left behind by the Los Angeles wildfires might be toxic, experts warn
item.description: Toni Boucher threw up the first time she saw the charred remains of her home and neighborhood after this month’s deadly Los Angeles-area wildfires. Now she wonders if it’s worth it to go back to sift through the ashes and try to find her grandmother’s wedding ring.
item.dc:creator: MELINA WALLING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump's first day back in White House includes firings, infrastructure announcement
item.description: President Donald Trump is spending his first full day back in the White House meeting with congressional leaders, making an infrastructure announcement and demonstrating one of his favored expressions of power: firing people.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-girlfriend of brother accused in gold-digging plot says she can’t afford attorney
item.description: Las Vegas Metro police said Jennifer Courtemanche plotted with her friend to steal nearly $445,000 from Gavin Maloof.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Murphy, NewsNation

item.title: Russia warns Trump against seizing Panama Canal
item.description: Russian officials reaffirmed their commitment to the neutrality of the critical trade route and said it expects both America and Panama to continue respecting that agreement.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: New migrant caravan making its way to border despite Trump taking office
item.description: Just hours before Trump was sworn into office on Monday, a migrant caravan of more than 2,000 people set off from deep in southern Mexico with the aim of crossing into the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nose spray to treat depression? FDA approves first-of-its-kind medicine
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved a nose spray to help treat depression, Johnson & Johnson announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Garth Hudson, The Band's last surviving member, dies at 87
item.description: Garth Hudson, the Band's virtuoso keyboardist and all-around musician who drew from a unique palette of sounds and styles to add a conversational touch to such rock standards as "Up on Cripple Creek," “The Weight” and "Rag Mama Rag," has died at age 87.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Home prices are rising across the US, especially in the Midwest
item.description: Once-affordable housing markets in the Midwest are now seeing the largest price increases, according to Redfin.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Cannon blocks DOJ from sharing Smith's Mar-a-Lago report with lawmakers
item.description: U.S. District Judge Aileen Cannon blocked the Justice Department from sharing with four top lawmakers the volume of former special counsel Jack Smith’s report reviewing his investigation into President Trump’s mishandling of classified records.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court won’t take up fight over Pennsylvania mail ballot date requirement
item.description: The Supreme Court said Tuesday it won’t hear civil rights groups’ appeal seeking to invalidate Pennsylvania's dating requirement for mail ballots, which has invalidated thousands of votes each recent election and become a central legal fight over voting in the key swing state.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: This house can protect itself during a wildfire
item.description: You've seen buildings and homes with fire sprinklers inside but what about on the roof? "It does save homes," said Harry Statter of Frontline Wildfire Defense, a company that makes an app and a system that can help defend your home from wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KTLA 5

item.title: California police arrest two in Palisades Fire evacuation zone after 'suspicious' behavior
item.description: Following arrests of alleged firefighter impersonators, officials say two more people have been taken into custody for using fake passes to unlawfully enter a fire evacuation zone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Border Patrol agent killed in Vermont
item.description: A U.S. Border Patrol agent was shot and killed in northern Vermont on Monday afternoon, the FBI said in a statement later that evening.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Two missing Ohio children found in Iceland
item.description: Aged 8 and 9, the children were taken by their mother from Ohio to the Nordic island nation after abandoning her home in Canton.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Trump fires 4 presidential appointees, including his former Iran envoy
item.description: President Donald announced the firing of four high-profile presidential appointees just after midnight Tuesday, including a top envoy to Iran during his first term and retired Gen. Mark Milley, who Trump tapped as Joint Chiefs chairman in 2018.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KRON4

item.title: Gen. Milley portrait taken down from Pentagon
item.description: The portrait, which had just been unveiled Jan. 10, hung in the Joint Chiefs hallway next to those of other former chairs.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, WGN 9

item.title: 5 takeaways as Trump returns to power
item.description: President Trump took office again Monday, completing a remarkable political comeback and becoming only the second person to serve nonconsecutive terms as commander in chief.
item.dc:creator: Niall Stanage, KRON4

item.title: Ohio State wins 1st national title since 2014, outlasting Notre Dame 34-23 in CFP championship game
item.description: Instead of crying over another collapse, Ohio State can celebrate another national title after holding off a Notre Dame comeback bid Monday night to walk away with a nailbiter of a 34-23 victory over the Fighting Irish.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump rolls out his blueprint on border security, but his orders will face challenges
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump rolled out a blueprint to beef up security at the southern border in a series of executive orders that began taking effect soon after his inauguration Monday, making good on his defining political promise to crack down on immigration and marking another wild
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, GISELA SALOMON and ELLIOT SPAGAT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump signs executive orders on federal workforce, free speech
item.description: President Trump signed multiple executive orders during his inauguration parade at Capital One Arena on Monday evening, throwing pens to supporters after a signing ceremony. The signings at a small desk set up on stage in the Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, Fox 5

item.title: Here's who skipped Trump's inauguration
item.description: President Trump was sworn into office for a second time on Monday before an audience in the Capitol that included his predecessor, former President Biden, as well as former Presidents Obama, Clinton and George W. Bush and multiple current and former officials and lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KRON4

item.title: Melania Trump hat: What people had to say about Inauguration Day fashion
item.description: Of all the things that people could be talking about on Inauguration Day, it didn't take long for people to latch onto the attire of Melania Trump, with one point of discussion taking the lead: her hat.
item.dc:creator: Brian Farrell, KRON4

item.title: Trump plans to rename Gulf of Mexico to 'Gulf of America,' reports say
item.description: Karoline Leavitt announced one of the day-one executive actions President-elect Trump will take is renaming the Gulf of Mexico to "Gulf of America," NBC announced.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bills will face Chiefs in AFC title game; Eagles will host the Commanders in NFC championship game
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills will take on Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC championship game for their fourth playoff matchup in five years. Allen ran for two touchdowns and the Bills beat Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens 27-25 in a divisional game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5
